mapper.select: select qty from t_scm_barcode where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' and rownum = 1
SELECT BARCODE, PNO, QTY FROM T_SCM_BARCODE WHERE TRADEBARCODE = #{barcode}
SELECT ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME FROM T_MI_ITEM WHERE DELDATE = ' ' AND BRANCH = '001' ORDER BY ITEMCODE
SELECT ITEMCODE FROM T_MI_ITEM -- 부품 바코드라 제품만 조회할 수 있도록 WHERE CMB_ITEMTYPE = '001' AND SPEC = #{spec}
mapper.update: update t_wms_location set useyn = 'N', memo_d = #{dmemo}, ymdhms_d=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_wms_inbound ( sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, qty,
source, storage, factory, tradebarcode, custcode, custname ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{qty},
#{source}, #{storage}, #{factory}, #{tradebarcode}, NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), ''), (SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = (NVL((SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_MI_PRICE_BUYCUST WHERE ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} ORDER BY CONDATE DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY), ''))) )

insert into t_wms_location ( sdate, ymdhms, location, barcode, itemcode, qty, memo, loginid, factory, storage, rack, module, levelcode, position, source, okyn ) values( #{date}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{location}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{qty}, #{memo}, #{loginid}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{rack}, #{module}, #{levelcode}, #{position}, #{source}, #{okyn} )
mapper.select: select cu_code||'_'||cu_sangho from c_cust where chk_buy =1 order by cu_sangho
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_realstock( sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, ymdhms, type, itemcode, storage, location, factory, source ) values ( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{type}, #{itemcode}, #{storage}, #{location}, #{factory}, #{source} )

INSERT INTO t_wms_outbound ( sdate, barcode, ymdhms, loginid, itemcode, seq, qty, source, source2, factory, custcode, custname, oitemcode ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{loginid}, #{itemcode}, #{seq}, #{qty}, #{source}, #{source2}, #{factory}, #{custcode}, #{custname}, #{oitemcode} )

INSERT INTO t_wms_stock ( sdate, kind, barcode, inqty, outqty, qty, itemcode, ymdhms, mainkind, loginid, insdate, factory ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{kind}, #{barcode}, 0, #{qty}, #{qty}, #{itemcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{main}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{factory} )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.iid, NVL(a.itemcode, ' ') AS itemcode, TO_NUMBER(a.qty) AS qty, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms,9,6) AS time FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode FROM ( SELECT barcode, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY barcode ORDER BY ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_location ) WHERE rn = 1 ) B ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.sdate = #{date} and a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source IN ('LOAD')
and a.custname LIKE '%' || #{custname} ||'%'
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_wms_validation ( SDATE, CARTBARCODE, ASSYBARCODE, CARTQTY, ASSYQTY, OITEMCODE, YMDHMS, SOURCE, factory ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{cartBarcode}, #{assyBarcode}, #{cartQty}, #{assyQty}, #{oitemcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{source}, #{factory} )
